title: Double Shulker Shells
description: A lightweight Paper plugin that increases the amount of dropped Shulker Shells
body: ## About A user-friendly Paper plugin that enables you to easily adjust the number of shulker shells dropped by a shulker upon its death. ## Customizing Shulker Shell Drops Easily adjust the shulker shell drop amount to your desired value by locating the config.yml file in your server's plugin directory and modifying the `shulker_shell_drop_amount` setting accordingly. ### Default `config.yml` ```assembly shulker_shell_drop_amount: 2 ``` ## Links **[Discord](https://discord.com/taako)** Coming soon! ~(maybe)~ **[Donate](https://ko-fi.com/taako)** Support the project if you've found it useful
